error.signature: RAG retrieval misses relevant docs — cosine similarity threshold too high

verdict.summary: Hardcoded cosine similarity threshold misses semantically relevant documents.

dead_ends.action: Set a universal threshold like 0.8 for all embedding models
dead_ends.why_fails: Different models have different similarity distributions

dead_ends.action: Use Euclidean distance instead of cosine for normalized embeddings
dead_ends.why_fails: For normalized vectors, cosine and Euclidean are monotonically related

workarounds.action: Calibrate threshold per embedding model using a validation set
workarounds.how: Find the threshold that maximizes F1 score on known-relevant docs

workarounds.action: Use top-K retrieval instead of threshold-based filtering
